scripts.dev: concurrently --names "后端,前端" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run start --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run dist --prefix desktop
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run check:assistant && npm run check:hygiene
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:assistant
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:backend && npm run test:coverage:frontend && npm run test:coverage:assistant
